chunks.text: ![Check out our QMSR Hub](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/7de56b9f-ab69-43ac-ab16-ebbf2ff0edd6.png) Solutions built for medical device teams to move faster, stay compliant, and grow with confidence. ![product-nav_quality-management-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_quality-management-icon.svg) Manage quality events, training, and documentation in one place. Control documents, training, and change with traceability. Track CAPAs, audits, and NCs with audit-ready records. Qualify suppliers and manage parts with visibility. ![product-nav_product-development-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_product-development-icon.svg) Connect design, risk, and AI-powered traceability as you build. Link needs, requirements, and verification to design controls. Automate traceability from dev tools for faster releases. Assess ISO 14971 risk as requirements and tests evolve. ![product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon.svg) Oversee studies with connected data, documents, and workflows. Capture compliant clinical data with a validated medical EDC. Plan and manage PMCF aligned to EU MDR expectations. Collect clinical outcome data in-person or remotely on any device. ![lightbulb-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/lightbulb-icon.svg) Built with regulatory insight to help medtech teams move faster with confidence. ![ai-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/ai-icon.svg) Find issues faster and make smarter decisions with less manual work. ![education-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/education-icon.svg) Tools and resources that help teams implement quickly and meet requirements. ![Asset 22@3x 1]() #### QMSR is coming. Is your quality system ready? This page is your one-stop resource for understanding what’s changing, what’s at stake, and how to stay compliant. ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) # Medical Device Risk Management Software ## Integrated and Compliant Risk Management Greenlight Guru eases audit stress with a Risk Management workspace offering full traceability with the rest of your QMS. Seamlessly integrate risk-based thinking across your device ecosystem for effortless compliance with ISO 14971:2019 and ISO 13485:2016. ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/11c0188f-da04-4ac2-b710-83bce071e064.png) ## 1,100+ of the world’s leading MedTech companies trust Greenlight Guru. ![C2Dx](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/c2dx_black.svg?format=webp) ![PhotoniCare](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Photonicare_black.png?format=webp&width=250&height=44&name=Photonicare_black.png) ![Sonavex](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Sonavex_black-1.png?format=webp&width=200&height=73&name=Sonavex_black-1.png) ![Astrego](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Astrego_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=46&name=Astrego_Black.png) ![Canterbury Scientific](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Canterbury_black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=50&name=Canterbury_black.png) ![Endowave](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Endowave_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=42&name=Endowave_Black.png) ![GlucoSet](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Glucoset_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=49&name=Glucoset_Black.png) ![MediView](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/MediView_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=60&name=MediView_Black.png) ![Milliken](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/Milliken_black.svg?format=webp) ![Puzzle Medical Hrtzl](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Puzzle_Hz_Black.png?format=webp&width=254&height=65&name=Puzzle_Hz_Black.png) ![Zyris](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Zyris_black_rs.png?format=webp&width=210&height=70&name=Zyris_black_rs.png) ![Risk](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Risk.png?format=webp&width=622&name=Risk.png) ## A Risk You Don’t Have To Accept Risk management can be a difficult process. Regulations like ISO 14971:2019 make it easier for MedTech companies. Too many companies find themselves falling short and wasting time on connecting their design controls with risk management or ensuring that risk management is a living process throughout the entire product lifecycle. For all these reasons, we developed Greenlight Guru. ## The Only ISO 14971 Aligned Risk Management Software For MedTech Leverage Greenlight Guru’s Risk Management Software to integrate risk throughout the entire product lifecycle and ensure compliance. ### Use Risk Management as an Asset Discover, mitigate, and prevent potential risks as early as possible. ### Integrate and Connect Risk Throughout Get a complete and accurate picture of risk through pre-market and post-market surveillance stages. ### Define Your Risks Identify risk acceptability criteria with an intuitive graphical interface tied to your design control matrix. ### Manage Your Risk Control Processes Easily link and connect design controls and documents as risk control measures to mitigate and reduce risks throughout the entire product lifecycle. ## Effective Risk Management Doesn’t Need To Be Complex Designed specifically for the MedTech industry with simplicity and flexibility in mind. ### Link Risk Management to Design and Development Activities Link and connect design controls and documents as risk control measures to mitigate and reduce risks throughout the entire device lifecycle. Link and connect design controls and

Risk levels are then evaluated based on your set criteria. ## Benefits for Teams ### For Product ## Benefits for Teams ### For Quality ### For Leaders ![risk management process total product lifecycle](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Imported_Blog_Media/risk%20management%20process%20total%20product%20lifecycle.png?format=webp&width=622&name=risk%20management%20process%20total%20product%20lifecycle.png) ## Integrate Risk-based Thinking Into Your Entire Quality Ecosystem Risk management is a total product lifecycle process. When a project is complete and in production, keep your risk management file up-to-date throughout the entire lifecycle by electronically reviewing, signing, and approving documentation with a single source of truth. ## Are You Ready to Experience the Greenlight Guru Difference? Get a deep dive into our Risk Management Software, ask questions, and see your risk matrix come to life. ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/11c0188f-da04-4ac2-b710-83bce071e064.png) #### 50 % #### 35 % #### 35 % ## Frequently Asked Questions ### How does Greenlight Guru support compliance with ISO 14971 and ISO 13485? ### Can I integrate risk management with my existing QMS, design controls, and development tools? ### How customizable is the risk acceptability matrix/scoring? ### What makes Greenlight Guru risk management software different from other platforms? ![ISO 9001 Certification]() ![ISO 27001 / 2022 Certification]() ![SOC for Service Organizations]() ![Greenlight Guru](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/GG22_theme-files/logos/greenlight-guru-logomark.svg) © 2026 Greenlight Guru.
